'''kawaha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:seabase|seabase]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-w-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:seabase|seabase]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| kawaha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kæwæhæth|kæwæhæth]] || [[word:kæwæhæj|kæwæhæj]] || [[word:kæwæhæsh|kæwæhæsh]] || [[word:kæwæhæ|kæwæhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:kawawahath|kawawahath]] || [[word:kawawahaj|kawawahaj]] || [[word:kawawahash|kawawahash]] || [[word:kawawaha|kawawaha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:kawahath|kawahath]] || [[word:kawahaj|kawahaj]] || [[word:kawahash|kawahash]] || [[word:kawaha|kawaha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:kawafhath|kawafhath]] || [[word:kawafhaj|kawafhaj]] || [[word:kawafhash|kawafhash]] || [[word:kawafhaf|kawafhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kawahatha|kawahatha]] || [[word:kawahaja|kawahaja]] || [[word:kawahasha|kawahasha]] || [[word:kawahaka|kawahaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kawahath|kawahath]] || [[word:kawahaj|kawahaj]] || [[word:kawahash|kawahash]] || [[word:kawaha|kawaha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kawahathal|kawahathal]] || [[word:kawahajal|kawahajal]] || [[word:kawahashal|kawahashal]] || [[word:kawahakal|kawahakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kawahathatha|kawahathatha]] || [[word:kawahajaja|kawahajaja]] || [[word:kawahashasha|kawahashasha]] || [[word:kawahaka|kawahaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kawahathan|kawahathan]] || [[word:kawahajan|kawahajan]] || [[word:kawahashan|kawahashan]] || [[word:kawahakan|kawahakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kawahathaoro|kawahathaoro]] || [[word:kawahajaoro|kawahajaoro]] || [[word:kawahashaoro|kawahashaoro]] || [[word:kawahakaoro|kawahakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
